title: Freshly Yeasty Greek Lamb Horiatiki Salad
description: A traditional Greek salad with a yeasty twist, featuring lamb and kabse spice, served in a tandoor clay pot. This high protein dish is perfect for a satisfying lunch.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor clay pot by placing it in a 400 degree oven for 10 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together yeast, kabse spice, and 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the yeast mixture.
Wrap each lamb cube in a lettuce leaf and place them in the preheated tandoor clay pot.
Steam the lamb for 10 minutes, then remove from heat and let cool.
In a large bowl, combine diced tomatoes, sliced cucumber, and thinly sliced red onion.
Add the cooled lamb to the bowl and toss to combine with the vegetables.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and remaining olive oil, then pour over the salad.
Top the salad with crumbly feta cheese and serve immediately.
